reviews.review_description: This game is booty cheek creek freak

This app helped me to learn how to backup a caravan trailer on a camping site.
Awesome simulator.
Everything works as expected.
With my Meta Quest 2 working really good.
I hope the devs can add a normal vehicle / car and a boats / camping trailer.
The driving experience was very realistic and amazing. I would like to have the paid version for free if u can.

it was fine and tell so on level two started glitching and i flipped over and now i'm stuck in a blue box i don't know what to do do so don't get this game if you don't wanna get glitched

This Game is pretty scuffed but I really enjoyed the demo and I look forward to buy the actual game. There are not much driving games and this is problably the best out there.

reviews.review_title: This is not a good game
reviews.review_description: I've played a lot of trucking games on vr and this is the worse because first it doesn't adjust height so some of the buttons are rather way too short or way to high that's why I wrote it one stars

This Game is so easy I beat it in 23 minutes and graphics are so bad instructions are also so very bad don’t download!

As an ex driver I was excited to see this, however, the app lasted about 14 minutes on my Quest 3s. Instructions are firstly in bad English and that's even if you can call them instructions.. absolutely dire. I'm sure the developer will enjoy playing this.. on their own.. I can't see anybody else wanting to play it!

I just got done playing and I could have played that for hours. The tutorial is just fine. I don't know what that guy was talking about. The levels are pretty cool I just dropped my first trailer. I thought that was hilarious. My Oculus died can't wait to turn it back on!
This game can help you drive in real life if you’re 18 or older if you have a license if you keep trying like a driving everywhere in real life, you will drive perfect I drive amazing in real life
It was fun my truck even started flying
Its fun to play the damo then you can buy the real one
The camera kept acting up when I was not touching it this game need a lot of fixing the tutorial is the worst tutorial I ever seen
so many glitches super laggy very bad barley drivable absolutely the worst game ever DO NOT INSTALL

This game is good but sometimes when you try to get In truck it doesn’t let you but overall it’s a great game
Hi
This game wouldn’t even let me get in the truck, nor use my hand for any use. Hands down one of the worst VR game I’ve ever played.
Im bouta play while im charging i hope this game is good

when u move the winch at the trailer it will start to move and then out of no where fly 
also the blinkers are too delicate when u move it at the middle it will go either up or down it’s hard to get it to stop but btw u don’t need to use blinkers it’s not mandatory but still

reviews.review_title: Not bad but open world should be free.
reviews.review_description: I understand it's the demo, but charging 10?! For open world is outrageous, please make open world free.
The game wouldn’t let me use my hands and was a complete waste of time.
I'm so good at this game that I made trucks fly
How do you get in the truck,and when you touch the truck it goes flying
When I press b like it says to get in the truck it don’t work

developer_response.body: In the tutorial it shows you that you have to be near the door. Go near the driver's door and press b to get in. Be careful if you are in front of the passenger door you will not be able to get in.

reviews.review_description: Very hard to drive in reverse but it is easy to drive forward.

I can back tractor under trailer,but have tried hundreds of times HOW DO YOU OPERATE THE LOCKING HANDLE, HOW HOW ,for God's sake why make it so difficult?  Most of time can't even see it ,every time I drive forward trailer drops off, also when sitting it's difficult to release parking brake/change gears.
Do the developers actually play these games in the real world? You have a great concept but needs to be simpler to use

developer_response.body: There is no locking handle, the trailer connects by itself and you will hear a sound. Yes, it is difficult to hit that nail at the beginning because I wanted it to be similar to the reality of the difficulty of hitting the nail from the trailer. We have given quite a lot of freedom to the movement in the cabin, you can rotate your character or you can move forwards or backwards with the help of your head. Yes, it is possible that in the first few hours it may seem difficult until you get used to it. we will try to improve some things in the next update.

reviews.review_description: Just try to touch the truck rear and it goes flying! Unusable.
TRUCK GO VROOM AND TRUCK GOES FLYING 💀💀

I wanted to try this i was able to hitch the trailer park in spot that's it and if you push a button not sure which one the truck and trailer blow up in the air and are gone have to start over what the heck. No instructions on like level 1 what to do after truck and trailer are parked nothing...also when you change from drive to reverse you use your trigger button for speed up or down took me forever to figure that out after crashing into everything.  So anybody know about what to do I don't want to buy the full version if you don't have instuctions

reviews.review_title: Steep learning curve but good app
reviews.review_description: If like me, you've never driven a semi, this sim can be a big challenge for reverse parking. I haven't succeeded yet.
